issue: Difficulty: ❌ TRIVIAL - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-express-trivia-worker for the TRIVIAL/HARD gate: added Appendix H rules H-2026-17 (ever-rescinded paired_incident parent taint, INC-40/INC-41 re-issue trap) and H-2026-18 (amend omit retains player, INC-42 dave +2), shortened instruction.md to reference scoring_standard.md instead of spelling out the full algorithm, updated scoring_standard.md, rulings.json, broken/solution replay workers, helpers, two new tests, rubric/explanations, and bumped Dockerfile platform-revision to 2026-06-30-r21.
